page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.hfr7.24xlarge is an x86_64 architecture server instance powered by the KVM hypervisor. It features 96 dedicated physical cores with a 1.0 thread-per-core ratio, utilizing the Intel Xeon 8369HB processor operating at a clock speed of 3.3 GHz. The instance is equipped with 768.0 GB of system memory, providing a resource density of 8.0 GB of RAM per core.

This instance does not include local storage, requiring external block storage solutions for data persistence. It also lacks dedicated GPU hardware, making it unsuitable for hardware-accelerated graphics or deep learning workloads. Network connectivity is supported by a baseline bandwidth of 32 Gbps, and the instance does not include complimentary public IPv4 addresses.

From a qualitative cost-efficiency perspective, the dedicated CPU allocation and high memory-to-core ratio position this instance for memory-intensive enterprise workloads. The absence of hyperthreading ensures predictable single-threaded execution performance per core. Suitable workloads include large-scale in-memory databases, enterprise resource planning systems, memory-bound data processing pipelines, and high-performance computing tasks that require substantial memory capacity without GPU acceleration.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.hfr7.24xlarge is an x86_64 server instance running on the KVM hypervisor, designed for memory-intensive workloads. It is equipped with 96 dedicated physical Intel Xeon 8369HB cores operating at 3.3 GHz, with a 1.0 thread-per-core ratio that eliminates hyperthreading for predictable performance. The system features 768.0 GB of RAM, establishing an 8.0 GB per core memory-to-CPU ratio. Network performance is supported by a baseline bandwidth of 32 Gbps. Tradeoffs include the complete absence of local storage and GPU accelerators, meaning all storage must be provisioned externally. This hardware profile is suited for in-memory databases, large-scale enterprise applications, and memory-bound data processing tasks.

tagline: A memory-optimized server featuring ninety-six dedicated Intel Xeon cores and seven hundred sixty-eight gigabytes of RAM for demanding enterprise workloads.
